AdditionalAttributes.description:
Red Bull Energy Drink is a carbonated taurine drink. Serve ice cold. Vitalizes Body and Mind. Appreciated worldwide by top athletes, students, busy professionals and travellers on long journeys.

Red Bull Energy Drink, 250ml (8 Pack)

 

RED BULL GIVES YOU WINGS

Inspired by functional drinks from the Far East, Dietrich Mateschitz founded Red Bull in the mid-1980s. He developed a new product and a unique marketing concept and launched Red Bull Energy Drink on April 1, 1987 in Austria. A brand new product category - Energy Drinks - was born.

WHEN TO DRINK

Appreciated worldwide by top athletes, students, busy professionals and travellers on long journeys.

WHAT’S INSIDE THE CAN

Caffeine: Caffeine was already known by ancient civilizations. They consumed it from natural sources like tea, coffee, cacao beans and cola nuts and appreciated its stimulating effects on the human body.

B-group vitamins: Vitamins are essential micronutrients that are required for maintaining normal body functions. Taurine: Taurine is an amino acid, naturally occurring in the human body and present in the daily diet. It is involved in a wide range of biological processes.

Taurine: Taurine is an amino acid, naturally occurring in the human body and present in the daily diet. It is involved in a wide range of biological processes.

Aspartame & Acesulfame K: Aspartame and Acesulfame K are among the most-tested and most-used sugar substitutes worldwide.

Alpine Water: Naturally, water is a main ingredient of Red Bull.

Red Bull Energy Drink's special formula contains ingredients of high quality: Caffeine, Taurine, B-Group Vitamins, Sugars, Alpine Water.

One 250ml can of Red Bull Energy Drink contains 80 mg of caffeine, about the same amount as in a cup of home-brewed coffee.

The amount of sugars in a can of Red Bull Energy Drink is comparable to the level of sugars in an equivalent amount of apple or orange juice – 11 g per 100 ml.

Red Bull cans are made of 100% recyclable aluminium.

Vitalizes Body and Mind.®

Treat everyone to a moment of indulgence with the Arnott’s Tim Tam Original family pack. Made with irresistible real chocolate, these biscuits are the perfect way to indulge in the afternoon or unwind at the end of a long day. This family pack of chocolate biscuits is the perfect size to share the indulgence with everyone.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Arnott's Monte Carlo Cream Biscuits. A delicious treat with coconut, honey, vanilla cream & jam, ideal for any treat. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Arnott's Monte Carlo cream-filled biscuits are the most iconic cream biscuit for a reason. With two coconut and honey biscuits filled with smooth vanilla cream wrapped in a chewy jam, it doesn't get much better than this.

Arnott’s Monte Carlo cream is the perfect morning treat to share with a pot of tea as you catch up with friends – or for when you’re feeling peckish. Named after the glamourous seaside city, the flavour of a Monte Carlo cream-filled biscuit will transport you to deliciousness. This Aussie favourite cream biscuit is made for those me-time moments when all you need to do is relax and unwind. With a simple twist and split, flavours of sweet coconut, honey, vanilla and jam await. Treat yourself to a spot by the Mediterranean with a Monte Carlo.

Arnott's most iconic cream biscuit

Ready to twist and split

Flavours of coconut, honey, vanilla and jam

Perfect for tea time

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Cobs Popcorn Sea Salt Gluten Free. A wholesome product, it's gluten-free and made with Australian corn, ideal for a satisfying snack. Shop now!
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Naturally Delicious

Made with only three simple, quality ingredients, Cobs Sea Salt Popcorn contains no artificial flavours, colours, or preservatives. It's gluten-free, nut-free, vegetarian, vegan and contains wholegrain. Next time you need a light, crunchy, and naturally flavourful snack, reach for the popcorn that Aussies love.


Australian-Made

Our Sea Salt is made right here in Australia using quality, locally sourced corn kernels. Popped to perfection in high oleic sunflower or canola oil, we create fluffy and crunchy popcorn, to which we sprinkle the perfect amount of sea salt.


The Perfect Snack for Every Occasion

Whether you're enjoying a backyard barbecue, packing school lunches, or settling in for a cozy movie night, Cobs Sea Salt Popcorn is the go-to snack. Its satisfying crunch and classic salty flavour make it the perfect companion for road trips, picnics, and afternoon pick me-ups.

Perfect for Entertaining Company
Whether you’re looking for that flavoursome fan-favourite to bring along to a gathering or looking to fuel your late-night gaming grind, this triangular gen-z icon never fails to excite.

Chips? Nachos? Anything.
In fact, it's so good that it makes a fantastic addition to your meal as a seasoning or even just to give your dinner that extra crunch factor.

Want to Doritos-fy your favourite dishes? 
Maybe a Doritos Mac & Cheese for that oh-so-satisfying crunch or an even cheesier toastie with our mind-boggling seasoning?

Check out our snazzy recipe and guide videos below for meal hacks that will tickle everybody’s tastebuds:
https://doritos.com.au/meal-hacks-doritos-recipes
All you need is a packet of Doritos Cheese Supreme Corn Chips and be bold enough to take the challenge on.

The Boldest of Cheese Snacks
Rest assured, Doritos are made in Australia from carefully selected ingredients that provide you with the unmistakably bold flavour we all know and love.
The only thing you need to worry about is whether there’ll be enough to go around!

The only love triangle you’ll ever want or need.

Guaranteed to satisfy even the fussiest of eaters, the toughest of foodies, and the most gourmet of tastebuds.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Naturally Delicious

Made with only four simple, quality ingredients, Cobs Lightly Salted Slightly Sweet Popcorn contains no artificial flavors, colours, or preservatives. It's gluten-free, nut-free, vegetarian, vegan and contains wholegrain. Next time you need a light, crunchy, and naturally flavourful snack, reach for the popcorn that Aussies love.


Australian-Made

Cobs Lightly Salted & Slightly Sweet Popcorn is made right here in Australia using quality, locally sourced corn kernels. Popped to perfection in high oleic sunflower or canola oil, we create fluffy and crunchy popcorn. A light sprinkle of sea salt and a touch of raw sugar bring the perfect balance of sweet and savoury flavors—an iconic taste that has made this our most beloved snack.


The Perfect Snack for Every Occasion

Whether you're enjoying a backyard barbecue, packing school lunches, or settling in for a cozy movie night, Cobs Lightly Salted & Slightly Sweet Popcorn is the go-to snack. Its satisfying crunch and deliciously balanced flavour make it the perfect companion for road trips, picnics, and afternoon pick me-ups.

Only Natural Ingredients, No Hidden Nasties
Made in Australia with all natural ingredients and no added flavours or colours, Red Rock Deli Sea Salt chips are roughly cut and slowly cooked in 100% sunflower oil for that satisfying crunch. Keeping things all natural ensures there are no hidden nasties to surprise you, making them scrumptious crisps like you never tasted before.

Platter-Worthy Perfection Made for Entertaining
Red Rock Deli Sea Salt Chips are a classic potato chip flavour that will go with anything; from the salty deli meats to the creamiest of cheeses on your next cheese platter. Our chips are perfect for an elevated dinner party or a casual dinner at home with friends watching the latest TV series. No matter what kind of atmosphere you’re trying to set up, Red Rock Deli is ready to support!

Draw Out Your Hidden Creativity
Get creative at your next picnic with our Red Rock Deli Sea Salt chips by dipping them in our Red Rock Deli dips. Or, for inspired passionate foodies, sprinkle crushed sea salt chips into your latest recipe for a delectable added crunch. Mac and Cheese? Savoury salad? Nachos with a twist? Red Rock Deli is here to make things deliciously wild!

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Foolproof Flavour Even the Foodies Will Love!Red Rock Deli Sweet Chilli and Sour Cream chips are a sure-fire people pleaser. Be tempted by the lingering sweet heat of chilli and paprika combined with just the right amount of smooth tangy sour cream.

Natural Aussie Ingredients
Our potato chips are proudly Australian-made, beginning with the finest potatoes harvested from Australian farms. Red Rock Deli Sweet Chilli and Sour Cream chips are roughly cut and slowly cooked in 100% Australian-grown canola oil for the most delectable crunch. Seasoned to supreme with the subtle spicy warmth of chilli and the coolness of sour cream. 

Deli Style Chips Made for Entertaining
Spice up your next dinner party or picnic feast with Red Rock Deli Sweet Chilli and Sour Cream chips. Savour the flavour of sweet chilli and sour cream. Add them as a side to your favourite cheese selection for platter-worthy perfection or serve them on their own for a dinner at home with friends. They are a better-for-you potato chips option that are sure to leave an impression.

Red Rock Deli potato chips are: 
• Impeccably seasoned with carefully selected flavour combinations
• Cut to perfect thickness and cooked deliciously crispy 
• Made with all natural colours and flavours 
• Deli-style chips cut to the perfect thickness and cooked deliciously crispy
• Gluten-free  
• Foodie-approved and perfect for any occasion

Feed your curiosity. 
 

Made in Australia with the finest potatoes harvested from Australian farms.

Gluten-free means they’re perfect for anyone and everyone.

Free from any artificial flavours and colours.

Carefully selected flavour combinations ensure a perfect marriage of that sweet chilli and sour cream taste of potato wedges.

Foodie-approved and perfect for entertaining, picnics or any occasion.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Lightly Salted, Authentic Mexican-Inspired FlavourTostitos Cantina Style Lightly Salted Corn Tortilla Chips deliver a golden crunch and a scrumptiously subtle, savoury flavour. Our crispy corn chips are inspired by authentic Mexican-inspired flavours that will transport your taste buds straight to our Cantina. Tostitos Lightly Salted Corn Chips are perfect when paired with an assortment of your favourite fresh toppings and they’re just as good straight out of the pack too! Tostitos tortilla chips are deliciously hearty, Mexican-style dippers that suit any occasion.

The Perfect Tortilla Chips for Toppings and Dips!
Finding the perfect snack bowl filler can be infuriating when your guests are just around the corner. About to crack? Your chips shouldn’t! All our irresistibly crunchy corn tortilla chips are built to take on all your favourite dips and toppings when snacking time comes around. Not sure where to start? We’ve popped our favourite Tostitos recipe on the back of every pack so you can pull out all the stops for a Mexican-style night at home. Whatever pairings you fancy, you can be sure that Tositos will stand the test of your favourite dip or topping.

Centrepiece of the Snack Table, Life of the Dinner Party
Our 175g share pack makes sure there’s more than enough to go around for everyone, no matter the occasion. Whether you’re filling the bowl for a Christmas Holiday family dinner, or laying out the ideal spread for a dinner party, give your guests their own base to build on. Share the love with our hearty dippers. Add a little variety to your party or lunch snacks and let your guests get to the good stuff!

The Couch Companion that Never Disappoints
If you’re looking for the perfect chip and dip combo for your late-night movie marathons, or just want a savoury snack to keep you company during TV time, Tostitos have you covered. Say Hola! to corn chips that can actually hold up to your favourite dips and TV shows. Our crispy, subtly savoury corn tortilla chips never disappoint! Better yet, Tostitos Lightly Salted Tortilla Corn Chips contain no added MSG and no artificial flavours or preservatives.

Tostitos Cantina Style Tortilla Corn Chips are the ideal dip and topping holders that actually hold up.

Our 175g share pack is the perfect size to add a little variety to your next Christmas Holiday gathering or dinner party.

No added MSG, artificial flavours or preservatives.

Find a recipe for your next Mexican-style night on the back of your favourite Tostitos.

The ideal couch companion to keep you company during your favourite TV shows and movies.

Health Star Rating of 3.5.
